summary: BioLens Complete UI/UX Upgrade Testing - All 7 sections on results page verified. Material DNA animated donut chart, comparison blocks with bullet points, expandable scoring explainer, trust counters, recent searches, 4-step How strip all working. Confidence tiers using new labels (Preliminary Match, Estimated Profile, Moderate Confidence, High Confidence). Typography: Manrope headlines + Inter body. FiberFoundry integration preserved.

minor.issue: Material Classification shows 'Vegan Leather' instead of expected 'Polyurethane'. Supabase may need updated material alias mapping.

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero, search bar, scan button, example chips
Homepage Example Scan Card shows 'Polyester Hoodie', Petroload 95, 'Petro-Based', 'HIGH PETRO-RISK' badges
Homepage Trust Counters Section (data-testid='trust-counters-section') shows 3 stats: Products Analyzed 2,300+, Materials Mapped 120+, High Petro-Risk Flags 1,640+
Homepage 4-step 'How BioLens Works' strip (data-testid='how-strip-section') with Search/Identify/Score/Alternatives
Homepage Recent Searches display (data-testid='recent-search-*') after performing a search - localStorage key 'biolens_recent_searches'
Homepage floating mobile scan button (data-testid='floating-scan-button') visible on mobile viewport (390x844), hidden on desktop
Search autocomplete works: typing 'poly' shows suggestions (poly, Polyol, poly fabric, Polyfill, polyamide, Polyamide)
Clicking autocomplete suggestion/pressing Enter navigates to results page
Results page Section 1: Product Scanned with 'Polyester hoodie', Material Classification: Polyester, badges: Petro-Based, HIGH PETRO-RISK, Preliminary Match
Results page Section 2: Petroload Score Panel 95/100 with gauge + 3 supporting metrics (Petro Dependence 95, Microplastic Risk 81, Bio-Replacement 5)
Results page Section 3: Material DNA animated donut chart (data-testid='material-dna-section') showing 95% Petroleum-Derived, 0% Natural Fiber, 5% Semi-Synthetic
Material DNA chart has 3 legend items (data-testid='dna-segment-petroleum', 'dna-segment-natural', 'dna-segment-hybrid')
Results page Section 4: Comparison Block (data-testid='comparison-card') with 'THIS PRODUCT VS BETTER OPTION' split layout with bullet points
Comparison Block shows: This Product (Polyester hoodie, 95 Petroload, fossil-derived, high microplastic) vs Better Option (Hemp hoodie, 12 Petroload, plant-based)
Results page Section 5: Material Analysis with Material Identified (Polyester), Why It Matters, Common Concerns, Health Score 49/100, Risk Signals (Pesticide Risk 0, Synthetic Fertilizer 0)
Results page Section 6: Better Material Paths (data-testid='alternatives-section') showing Hemp, Linen, Wool alternatives

Results page Section 7: 'How BioLens Scored This' expandable section (data-testid='scoring-explainer') - click toggle to expand shows Material Match, Petrochemical Dependency, Product Category Weighting, Replacement Pathway

Results page Better Product Examples section (data-testid='where-to-buy-section') with FiberFoundry products (Hemp Backpack, Hemp Notebook, Hemp Hoodie, Linen Shirt, Linen Bedding Set) + 'coming soon' text

Share button opens share card modal (data-testid='share-card-modal') with Material DNA info (95% Petroleum, 0% Natural, 5% Semi-Synthetic), Better Alternative chips (Hemp, Linen, Wool), Share/Download/Story Format buttons
Results for 'hemp shirt': shows Plant-Based, LOW PETRO-RISK, High Confidence, Petroload 8/100, Material DNA 87% Natural Fiber, 'great material choice' message (data-testid='no-alternatives-section')
Hemp shirt results show no Comparison Card (hidden for good materials)
Explore Materials page loads with Material Library heading, 6 category filters (All, Petro-Based, Plant-Based, Transition, Natural, Mineral)
Explore Materials cards show PETROLOAD and HEALTH scores - Petro-Based shows 85/35, Plant-Based shows 10/82
Navigation: Home, Explore Materials, How It Works links all work correctly
Backend API /api/ responds with 200 and 'BioLens API' message
Backend /api/materials endpoint returns 26 materials
All 11 backend pytest tests pass
action_items: Consider updating Supabase material aliases to map 'vegan leather' to 'Polyurethane' for accurate Material Classification display
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete UI/UX upgrade verified. Key components: MaterialDNA (animated SVG donut chart with getMaterialDNA export), ComparisonBlock (split layout with bullet points), ScoringExplainer (expandable accordion). Trust counters are PLACEHOLDER values (2,300+/120+/1,640+). Recent searches stored in localStorage 'biolens_recent_searches'. Scan history stored in 'biolens_scan_history'. Confidence labels: High Confidence (>=0.95), Moderate Confidence (>=0.85), Estimated Profile (>=0.70), Preliminary Match (<0.70). FiberFoundry product cards show 'coming soon'. Material DNA percentages computed from materialClass + petroloadScore via getMaterialDNA() function.
